Identity.Name: Pset_StingDrawing
Identity.Definition: Drawing-engine stamp for sheets, views, and document references. Attached by DrawingTypeStamper (Phase 113) so each STING-managed view / sheet / annotation carries the DrawingType id + crop strategy + style-pack reference + token profile that produced it. Drives drift detection (Phase 183 DrawingDriftDetector), SyncStyles re-apply, and BrowserOrganizer grouping.

Governance.StandardsBasis: STING Drawing Template Manager (Phase 113); Drawing Type registry; STING TokenProfile (Phase 135); Phase 183 LiveProfileSync; Phase 184c crop stamp via Extensible Storage

Property.name: DrawingTypeId
Property.Definition: Drawing Type id from the active STING_DRAWING_TYPES.json registry — e.g. "arch-plan-A1-1to100", "mep-coord-A1-1to50", "pres-3d-axon-A1". Anchors the view/sheet to its profile so SyncStyles + drift detection can find it. Cross-bound to PARAM_REGISTRY.STING_DRAWING_TYPE_ID_TXT on the Revit side.

Property.name: StyleLocked
Property.Definition: When true, SyncStyles + DriftDetector skip this view/sheet. Used for one-off stylings the user wants protected from registry-driven updates. Cross-bound to STING_STYLE_LOCKED_BOOL on Revit.

Property.name: CropKind
Property.Definition: Crop strategy applied at view-creation time. References StingCropKinds. Captured at the time DrawingCropApplier ran so drift detection can flag profile crop-margin changes. Cross-bound to STING_CROP_KIND_TXT (Phase 184c).

Property.name: CropMarginMm
Property.Definition: Crop margin in millimetres at the time the crop was applied. Drift detection compares this to the profile's current value (1mm tolerance). Cross-bound to STING_CROP_MARGIN_MM_TXT (Phase 184c).

Property.name: PackId
Property.Definition: View Style Pack id from STING_VIEW_STYLE_PACKS.json (e.g. "corp-standard-plan", "corp-coordination", "corp-healthcare-clinical"). For managed-template packs (Phase 137), this is the pack that minted the template. Cross-bound to STING_PACK_ID_TXT.

Property.name: PackChecksum
Property.Definition: SHA-256 of the View Style Pack at apply time. Lets ManagedTemplateSyncer detect that the pack has drifted on disk vs the template's last-sync state. Cross-bound to STING_PACK_CHECKSUM_TXT.

Property.name: TokenProfileId
Property.Definition: Phase 135 TokenProfile id — bundles tag-depth + style preset + segment mask + colour scheme into a named profile. References STING_DRAWING_TYPES.json TokenProfile binding. Cross-bound to STING_VIEW_TAG_STYLE.

Property.name: TagDepth
Property.Definition: Paragraph depth tier (1..10). Controls how much of the TAG7 narrative is shown on this view. Higher = more sections visible.

Property.name: SegmentMask
Property.Definition: Bitmask string indicating which of the 8 tag segments are displayed on tags in this view. "11111111" = all 8 visible. "10110000" = only DISC, ZONE, LVL visible. Cross-bound to TAG_SEG_MASK_TXT.

Property.name: ColourScheme
Property.Definition: Active colour scheme on this view. References StingColorSchemes. Drives view-template overrides + tag-text colour switching.

Property.name: SheetNumber
Property.Definition: Substituted sheet number from the DrawingType.sheetNumberPattern (e.g. "M-101", "A-201"). Carried on the IfcDocumentInformation; mirrors the title-block sheet number.

Property.name: SheetName
Property.Definition: Substituted sheet name from the DrawingType.sheetNamePattern. Mirrors the title-block sheet name.

Rule.Description: DrawingTypeId must resolve to a known profile in the active STING_DRAWING_TYPES.json (corporate baseline + project overlay merge). Unknown ids indicate the project was opened after a drawing-type registry edit removed the profile.
Rule.FailMessage: DrawingTypeId references a profile not in the active registry.
Rule.RemediationInstruction: Re-apply the profile via DrawingTypeApplier, or update the registry to retain the profile.

Rule.Description: Phase 184c stamp — when CropKind / CropMarginMm are set, they should match the profile's current values within 1mm tolerance. BEHAVIOURAL ASSERTION: drift is reported by DrawingDriftDetector.AppendCropDrift; SpatialChecker has no equivalent. STING-side enforcement only.
Rule.FailMessage: CropKind / CropMarginMm drift from active profile.
Rule.RemediationInstruction: Run DrawingTypes_SyncStyles to re-apply the profile crop strategy.

Rule.Description: PackChecksum (when set) should equal the SHA-256 of the View Style Pack's current state. Mismatch means the pack has drifted on disk since this view was last synced. BEHAVIOURAL ASSERTION: tested by ManagedTemplateSyncer.
Rule.RemediationInstruction: Run DrawingTypes_SyncStyles to re-apply pack settings + update the checksum.
